name: coding-agent-harness
description: Centralized coding-agent harness bundles for Codex.

plugins.name: harness-backend-spring
plugins.description: Spring Boot 3.5 rules and a Spring reviewer agent.

plugins.name: harness-core
plugins.description: Core harness: always-on global coding rules, a local /code-review command, deterministic pre-commit + format/lint/test hooks, and a pre-PR review skill.

plugins.name: harness-data-platform
plugins.description: Oracle/MariaDB and ClickHouse/MinIO rules and a SQL reviewer agent.

plugins.name: harness-frontend-nextjs
plugins.description: Next.js 16 / React rules, a Next.js reviewer agent, and an App Router route scaffolder command.
